'''nawogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dyker|dyker]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-w-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dyker|dyker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nawogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næwegeth|næwegeth]] || [[word:næwegej|næwegej]] || [[word:næwegesh|næwegesh]] || [[word:næwege|næwege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nawowogoth|nawowogoth]] || [[word:nawowogoj|nawowogoj]] || [[word:nawowogosh|nawowogosh]] || [[word:nawowogo|nawowogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nawogoth|nawogoth]] || [[word:nawogoj|nawogoj]] || [[word:nawogosh|nawogosh]] || [[word:nawogo|nawogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nawofgoth|nawofgoth]] || [[word:nawofgoj|nawofgoj]] || [[word:nawofgosh|nawofgosh]] || [[word:nawofgof|nawofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nawogotho|nawogotho]] || [[word:nawogojo|nawogojo]] || [[word:nawogosho|nawogosho]] || [[word:nawogoko|nawogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nawogoth|nawogoth]] || [[word:nawogoj|nawogoj]] || [[word:nawogosh|nawogosh]] || [[word:nawogo|nawogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nawogothol|nawogothol]] || [[word:nawogojol|nawogojol]] || [[word:nawogoshol|nawogoshol]] || [[word:nawogokol|nawogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nawogothotho|nawogothotho]] || [[word:nawogojojo|nawogojojo]] || [[word:nawogoshosho|nawogoshosho]] || [[word:nawogoko|nawogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nawogothon|nawogothon]] || [[word:nawogojon|nawogojon]] || [[word:nawogoshon|nawogoshon]] || [[word:nawogokon|nawogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nawogothoro|nawogothoro]] || [[word:nawogojoro|nawogojoro]] || [[word:nawogoshoro|nawogoshoro]] || [[word:nawogokoro|nawogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
